api_boundaries.description: Upload patient health report with file attachment. Supports PNG, JPG, JPEG, PDF formats with 10MB size limit. Requires patient role and health:report:write permission.
Query paginated list of health reports for a patient with optional filters.
Get detailed information of a specific health report by report ID.
Generate AI-powered schedule suggestions for doctor appointments and consultations.
Query doctor's schedule list with filtering and pagination options.
Get detailed information of a specific schedule entry.
Mark a schedule as completed with diagnosis information and treatment notes.
Cancel a scheduled appointment with cancellation reason.
api_boundaries.request_format: JSON body with scheduleId and reason

api_boundaries.description: Update the status of a schedule entry (e.g., pending, in-progress, completed).
api_boundaries.request_format: JSON body with scheduleId and status

api_boundaries.description: Retrieve doctor's profile and workbench information.
User authentication endpoint for SSO login. Returns JWT access and refresh tokens.
User registration endpoint (not implemented yet).
Send SMS verification code for authentication (not implemented yet).
Refresh expired access token using valid refresh token.
Validate JWT token and extract user information including roles and permissions.
Revoke current token and invalidate user session.
Query user's inbox messages with pagination support.
api_boundaries.request_format: Query parameters for pagination and filters

api_boundaries.description: Query user's sent messages with pagination support.
api_boundaries.request_format: Query parameters for pagination and filters

api_boundaries.description: Get detailed content of a specific message.
Mark a single message as read.
Mark multiple messages as read in batch.
Delete a single message.
Delete multiple messages in batch.
Get count of unread messages for current user.

router_boundaries.description: Authentication service routes - handles login, registration, token management and SSO operations. Routed to auth-provider service with load balancing.

params.description: Strips 1 path segment before forwarding to downstream service

router_boundaries.description: Account management service routes - handles user profile, password management, and role assignments. Routed to account-service with load balancing.

params.description: Strips 1 path segment before forwarding to downstream service

router_boundaries.description: Order service routes - handles medical appointment orders and transactions. Routed to order-service with load balancing.

params.description: Strips 1 path segment before forwarding to downstream service

integration_suggestions.description: Integrate with internal microservices via Apache Dubbo RPC framework. Use @DubboReference annotation for service discovery and load balancing through Nacos registry.
best_practices: Set check=false to allow startup without provider availability
Configure appropriate timeout values (default 5000ms recommended)
Use version parameter for service version management
Implement circuit breaker pattern with Sentinel for fault tolerance
Always handle RpcException for graceful degradation

integration_suggestions.description: Implement JWT-based authentication flow using RSA 2048-bit asymmetric encryption. Tokens are validated through Gateway and TokenValidationAPI.
best_practices: Store refresh tokens securely, never expose in URLs or logs
Implement token refresh before access token expiration
Use environment variables for RSA keys in production (avoid dynamic generation)
Include X-User-Id header for downstream service authorization
Implement logout to revoke tokens when session ends

integration_suggestions.description: External clients should integrate through the API Gateway (port 8080) which provides unified entry point with CORS, rate limiting, and JWT validation.
best_practices: Always route external traffic through Gateway on port 8080
Configure connection pool (max 100 connections, 20 per route recommended)
Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for transient failures
Handle Sentinel rate limiting responses (HTTP 429)
Use structured logging with traceId from UserInfoManager for distributed tracing

integration_suggestions.description: Health report file uploads through HealthReportController with OSS backend storage. Supports multipart/form-data with MIME type validation.
best_practices: Validate file size client-side (max 10MB)
Only upload allowed MIME types: image/png, image/jpg, image/jpeg, application/pdf
Validate file extension matches MIME type to prevent spoofing
Use chunked upload for large files in production
Implement virus scanning before OSS storage in sensitive environments

integration_suggestions.description: Integrate with MessageAPI for sending notifications, broadcast messages, and push notifications to users via Dubbo RPC.
best_practices: Use batch operations for multiple recipients to reduce RPC calls
Implement message deduplication to prevent duplicate notifications
Configure Redis for message queue buffering during high load
Set appropriate message expiration for time-sensitive notifications
Track message delivery status for critical communications

integration_suggestions.description: Production security hardening recommendations for the chronic care AI platform deployment.
integration_suggestions.example_code:
# Environment variables for production
export ENCRYPTION_AES_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 32)
export ENCRYPTION_AES_IV=$(openssl rand -base64 16)
export JWT_RSA_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH=/etc/secrets/jwt-private.pem
export JWT_RSA_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH=/etc/secrets/jwt-public.pem

# CORS configuration for production (application.yaml)
spring:
  cloud:
    gateway:
      globalcors:
        corsConfigurations:
          '[/**]':
            allowedOrigins:
              - "https://patient.hospital.com"
              - "https://doctor.hospital.com"
            allowedMethods: [GET, POST, PUT, DELETE]
            allowCredentials: true
best_practices: Replace hardcoded AES keys with environment variables (ENCRYPTION_AES_KEY/IV)
Load RSA keys from secure config server or KMS instead of dynamic generation
Restrict CORS allowedOrigins to specific trusted domains in production
Enable HTTPS/TLS termination at Gateway or load balancer
Implement rate limiting per user/IP using Redis-backed Sentinel rules
Use MyBatis parameterized queries exclusively to prevent SQL injection
Enable audit logging for all authentication and authorization events
